# Daily Report — 2026-07-12

## Task Completed
Added `create_change_schedule_span` tool (POST cmn_schedule_span). Defines new time-block spans within a parent change schedule. Required fields: `name`, `schedule` (sys_id or exact schedule name auto-resolved), `start_date_time`, `end_date_time`. Optional: `repeat_type` (none/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly), `day_of_week` (0–6 for weekly spans), `all_day` (bool serialised as string), `repeat_until` (YYYY-MM-DD date validated), `span_type`. Response includes normalised span with `day_of_week_label`. Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages in `tool_packages.yaml`.

- Total tests: 2206
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

System-level packages flagged (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — same baseline as prior days; no project dependency vulnerabilities.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import and tool registry entry
